action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline mIoU=0.2832 after 3 epochs (~5 min/epoch). Model is improving. Analysis: With 7.54h remaining, I can train ~80 more epochs (5 min each = ~6.7h). SegFormer-b5 typically reaches 50+ mIoU on ADE20K with proper training. Decision: Train for 40 more epochs from checkpoint, then evaluate. Also increase crop size to 640 for better performance.
